name: Kentucky Office of Vital Statistics — Birth Certificates
description: Kentucky Office of Vital Statistics issues certified copies of birth, death, marriage, divorce, and stillbirth records for events that occurred in Kentucky (birth records from 1911 forward). A certified birth certificate is required to obtain a Kentucky driver's license or state ID. Order in person at the Frankfort office, by mail, online through VitalChek, or via will-call pickup after an online order. Fee: $10 per certificate (non-refundable search fee). Walk-in customers may pay by cash, check/money order payable to Kentucky State Treasurer, or debit/credit (+$2.50 processing fee). Same-day service not guaranteed after 3:45 p.m.
description_es: La Oficina de Estadísticas Vitales de Kentucky emite copias certificadas de nacimiento, defunción, matrimonio, divorcio y mortinato ocurridos en Kentucky (nacimientos desde 1911). Se requiere certificado de nacimiento certificado para licencia de conducir o identificación estatal. Solicite en persona en Frankfort, por correo, en línea por VitalChek o recogida will-call. Tarifa: $10 por certificado (tarifa de búsqueda no reembolsable). Servicio el mismo día no garantizado después de las 3:45 p.m.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: VitalChek phone: 1-877-817-7362
notes_es: VitalChek en línea/teléfono: 1-877-817-7362 o vitalchek.com. Envíe solicitudes por correo a OVS, 275 East Main Street, 1E-A, Frankfort, KY 40621.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. EST (walk-in lobby until 3:30 p.m.; same-day not guaranteed after 3:45 p.m.)
services: Document assistance|Partner referrals|Civil legal representation

name: Kentucky Driver Licensing (DRIVE) — State ID
description: Kentucky Transportation Cabinet Driver Licensing (DRIVE) issues standard and REAL ID driver's licenses and personal identification cards at regional offices statewide. Returning citizens with felony convictions can use a Felon Release Letter from KDOC, Division of Probation and Parole, Federal Bureau of Prisons (Kentucky facility), or U.S. Probation Office—plus a certified U.S. birth certificate—as primary identity proof for a standard credential. Letter must be presented within 30 calendar days of its issue date. Use the IDocument Guide at drive.ky.gov to build a personalized document checklist before visiting.
description_es: Licencias de conducir e identificaciones del Gabinete de Transporte de Kentucky (DRIVE) se emiten en oficinas regionales. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación del KDOC, División de Libertad Condicional, Buró Federal de Prisiones (instalación en Kentucky) o Oficina de Libertad Condicional de EE.UU.—más certificado de nacimiento certificado de EE.UU. La carta debe presentarse dentro de 30 días calendario. Use la Guía IDocument en drive.ky.gov antes de visitar.
eligibility: Returning citizens with felony convictions can use a Felon Release Letter from KDOC, Division of Probation and Parole, Federal Bureau of Prisons (Kentucky facility), or U.S.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: Schedule appointments at any Driver Licensing Regional Office via drive.ky.gov.
notes_es: Programe citas en oficinas regionales en drive.ky.gov. Bajo supervisión, la carta debe estar notarizada y firmada por el oficial supervisor. REAL ID requiere documentación adicional.
hours: Regional office hours vary; appointments recommended—check drive.ky.gov for locations
services: Document assistance|Civil legal representation|Partner referrals

name: Kentucky Driver Licensing — License Reinstatement
description: Kentucky Driver Licensing handles license reinstatement after suspensions. Standard reinstatement/re-licensing fee is $40 (pay online via myDrive, in person, by mail with certified check/money order payable to Kentucky State Treasurer, or by phone at 502-564-1257 with debit/credit). Paying the fee alone does not restore driving privileges—all suspension conditions (court orders, DUI classes, ignition interlock, etc.) must be satisfied first. If suspended more than one year, vision and written tests are required before reinstatement. Active ID card must be canceled before paying reinstatement fee.
description_es: Licencias de Kentucky maneja restablecimiento después de suspensiones. Tarifa estándar de restablecimiento: $40 (pague en línea por myDrive, en persona, por correo con cheque certificado/giro al Kentucky State Treasurer, o por teléfono al 502-564-1257). Pagar la tarifa sola no restaura privilegios—deben cumplirse todas las condiciones de suspensión. Si la suspensión supera un año, se requieren exámenes de visión y escritos. Debe cancelar identificación activa antes de pagar.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: Pay by phone with debit/credit: (502) 564-1257
notes_es: Programe exámenes escritos/carretera con Kentucky State Police en kentuckystatepolice.ky.gov/driver-testing. Portal myDrive en drive.ky.gov.
hours: Reinstatement payments: online 24/7; phone and regional offices during business hours
services: Rent and utility assistance|Document assistance|Partner referrals

name: Social Security Administration — Louisville
description: Social Security Administration field office in downtown Louisville (Gene Snyder U.S. Courthouse) handles Social Security card replacement, new cards, SSN verification, and retirement/disability benefit applications. A Social Security card or number verification is required for Kentucky driver's licenses, employment, and most public benefits. As of January 2025, SSA field offices operate on an appointment-focused model—call ahead or use ssa.gov to schedule in-person service. Many services available online at ssa.gov without a visit.
description_es: Oficina de la SSA en el centro de Louisville (Tribunal Gene Snyder) maneja reemplazo de tarjeta del Seguro Social, tarjetas nuevas, verificación de SSN y solicitudes de beneficios. Se requiere tarjeta o verificación de SSN para licencias de Kentucky, empleo y la mayoría de beneficios públicos. Desde enero de 2025, las oficinas operan con citas—llame o use ssa.gov. Muchos servicios disponibles en línea sin visita.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: Appointment phone: (866) 716-9671. TTY: (502) 582-5517. National line: 1-800-772-1213 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). Entrance on 6th Street at Broadway Room 101, 1st floor.
notes_es: Teléfono de citas: (866) 716-9671. TTY: (502) 582-5517. Línea nacional: 1-800-772-1213. Entrada en 6th Street y Broadway Sala 101.
hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.; Wednesday 9:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m.
services: Document assistance|Benefits navigation|Partner referrals

name: Social Security Administration — Lexington
description: SSA field office serving Fayette County and Central Kentucky, located off Winchester Road near the I-64/I-75 interchange. Provides Social Security card replacement, SSN verification, and benefit applications. Required for employment and obtaining Kentucky ID. Appointment recommended under SSA's appointment-focused service model effective January 2025—call local office or 1-800-772-1213. Ground-floor office; many transactions completable online at ssa.gov.
description_es: Oficina de la SSA que sirve al Condado de Fayette y centro de Kentucky, cerca de Winchester Road e intercambio I-64/I-75. Ofrece reemplazo de tarjeta del Seguro Social, verificación de SSN y solicitudes de beneficios. Cita recomendada bajo el modelo de citas de la SSA desde enero de 2025. Oficina en planta baja; muchas transacciones en línea en ssa.gov.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: Appointment phone: (866) 530-7754. TTY: (859) 294-5753. From I-75 Exit 110 (US 60 West), turn at Country Inn and Suites, then right on Buena Vista Rd.
notes_es: Teléfono de citas: (866) 530-7754. TTY: (859) 294-5753. Desde I-75 Salida 110, gire en Country Inn and Suites, luego derecha en Buena Vista Rd.
hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.; Wednesday 9:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m.
services: Document assistance|Benefits navigation|Partner referrals

name: Social Security Administration — Locate an Office
description: Use SSA's national office locator to find the nearest Social Security field office anywhere in Kentucky. A Social Security number and card (or SSA verification letter) is required to obtain a Kentucky driver's license or state ID and for most employment. Call 1-800-772-1213 for automated services and appointment scheduling, or visit ssa.gov for online card replacement and benefit applications. As of 2025, in-person field office visits generally require an appointment.
description_es: Use el localizador nacional de la SSA para encontrar la oficina más cercana en Kentucky. Se necesita número y tarjeta del Seguro Social (o carta de verificación) para licencia de conducir o identificación estatal y para la mayoría del empleo. Llame al 1-800-772-1213 para servicios automatizados y citas, o visite ssa.gov. Desde 2025, las visitas en persona generalmente requieren cita.
eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
notes: National toll-free: 1-800-772-1213 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). TTY: 1-800-325-0778. Online services at ssa.gov/myaccount for many card and benefit needs.
notes_es: Línea nacional: 1-800-772-1213 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). TTY: 1-800-325-0778. Servicios en línea en ssa.gov/myaccount.
hours: National phone line Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–7:00 p.m.; field office hours vary by location
services: Partner referrals|Document assistance

name: LIHEAP — Utility Assistance (Community Action Kentucky)
description: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) helps eligible Kentucky households pay heating, cooling, and crisis utility bills. Administered through local Community Action Agencies in all 120 counties via Community Action Kentucky (CAPKY). Three components: Subsidy (seasonal, typically November–December), Crisis (heating emergencies, January–March), and Summer Subsidy (cooling, July–September). Income at or below 150% of Federal Poverty Guidelines. Apply at your county's Community Action office—call 1-800-456-3452 or use capky.org/network to find your local agency.
description_es: LIHEAP ayuda a hogares elegibles de Kentucky a pagar facturas de calefacción, refrigeración y crisis. Administrado por Agencias de Acción Comunitaria en 120 condados vía CAPKY. Tres componentes: Subsidio (noviembre–diciembre), Crisis (emergencias de calefacción, enero–marzo) y Subsidio de Verano (refrigeración, julio–septiembre). Ingresos hasta 150% de las Pautas Federales de Pobreza. Solicite en su oficina local—llame al 1-800-456-3452 o use capky.org/network.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: Call to find your local Community Action office
notes_es: Componente Crisis requiere aviso de desconexión o combustible bajo. Traiga SSN de todos los miembros, comprobante de ingresos del mes anterior y facturas de servicios.
hours: Local agency hours vary; statewide info line during business hours
services: Rent and utility assistance|Crisis services|Partner referrals

name: Northern Kentucky Community Action Commission (NKCAC)
description: Northern Kentucky Community Action Commission (NKCAC) administers LIHEAP and other financial assistance for Boone, Campbell, Carroll, Gallatin, Grant, Kenton, Owen, and Pendleton counties. LIHEAP Subsidy provides seasonal electric/heating credits; Crisis component assists households with disconnect notices or within four days of running out of bulk fuel (January–March, walk-ins accepted within 48 hours of disconnect). Also offers Head Start, job training, adult education, and weatherization. Schedule LIHEAP appointments online at nkcac.10to8.com or call (859) 484-8450.
description_es: NKCAC administra LIHEAP y otra asistencia financiera en ocho condados del norte de Kentucky. Subsidio LIHEAP ofrece créditos estacionales; componente Crisis ayuda con avisos de desconexión o combustible a granel bajo (enero–marzo). También ofrece Head Start, capacitación laboral y climaización. Programe citas LIHEAP en nkcac.10to8.com o llame al (859) 484-8450.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: LIHEAP line: (859) 655-2959
notes_es: Centro LIHEAP Condado Kenton: 533 W. Pike Street, Covington (859) 655-2959.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:30 a.m.–4:00 p.m. (neighborhood centers; LIHEAP by appointment)
services: Crisis services|Rent and utility assistance|GED and high school equivalency|Job readiness training

name: kynect — KTAP & Financial Assistance
description: kynect is Kentucky's online benefits portal for applying for KTAP (Kentucky Transitional Assistance Program) cash assistance, SNAP food benefits, Medicaid, Child Care Assistance Program (CCAP), and other programs. KTAP provides monthly cash aid to low-income families with dependent children, with a 60-month lifetime limit, plus work support through Kentucky Works. Apply online at kynect.ky.gov, by phone at 855-306-8959, or in person at any DCBS office in all 120 counties. Use the prescreening tool before applying to check potential eligibility.
description_es: kynect es el portal en línea de beneficios de Kentucky para KTAP (asistencia en efectivo), SNAP, Medicaid, CCAP y otros programas. KTAP proporciona ayuda mensual a familias de bajos ingresos con hijos dependientes, con límite de 60 meses de por vida. Solicite en kynect.ky.gov, al 855-306-8959 o en cualquier oficina DCBS en 120 condados. Use la herramienta de preselección antes de solicitar.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET).
notes_es: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET). Requiere cuenta Kentucky Online Gateway (KOG). Beneficiarios KTAP pueden calificar para cuidado infantil y transporte.
hours: Phone line Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. ET; online applications 24/7
services: Cash assistance (TANF)|Medicaid enrollment|Child care assistance|Partner referrals

name: 211 Kentucky — Crisis Resource Navigation
description: Kentucky 211 connects residents to local emergency financial assistance, food, housing, utilities, mental health services, and other community resources. Dial 2-1-1 from any phone or text your zip code to 898211 to reach a trained specialist 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Service provided through United Way of Kentucky's network covering all 120 counties. Free, confidential, and available in multiple languages with interpreter support. Also searchable online at kentucky211.org.
description_es: Kentucky 211 conecta a residentes con asistencia financiera de emergencia, alimentos, vivienda, servicios públicos, salud mental y otros recursos comunitarios. Marque 2-1-1 o envíe su código postal al 898211 para hablar con un especialista las 24 horas. Servicio de la red United Way de Kentucky en 120 condados. Gratuito, confidencial y con intérpretes. También busque en línea en kentucky211.org.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: Text zip code to 898211 (no hyphen). 211 does not provide direct cash assistance—specialists refer to local programs. Pairs with kynect.ky.gov for benefits applications.
notes_es: Envíe código postal al 898211. 211 no proporciona efectivo directo—refiere a programas locales. Complementa kynect.ky.gov para beneficios.
hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
services: Partner referrals

name: Bank On Louisville — Second-Chance Banking
description: Bank On Louisville is a city-led coalition connecting Louisville residents—including those with ChexSystems or prior banking problems—to certified low-cost checking accounts at mainstream banks and credit unions. Certified accounts meet national Bank On standards: no overdraft or NSF fees, $5 or less monthly, free deposits/withdrawals/bill pay. Participating institutions include Bank of America, Chase, Fifth Third, PNC, U.S. Bank, Park Community Credit Union, and others. Also offers financial education and connects to the Louisville Financial Empowerment Center for free one-on-one counseling.
description_es: Bank On Louisville es una coalición municipal que conecta a residentes de Louisville—incluso con historial en ChexSystems—a cuentas corrientes certificadas de bajo costo. Cuentas certificadas: sin cargos por sobregiro, $5 o menos al mes, depósitos/retiros/pagos gratis. Instituciones participantes incluyen Bank of America, Chase, Fifth Third, PNC, U.S. Bank y Park Community Credit Union. También ofrece educación financiera y el Centro de Empoderamiento Financiero.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: Led by Louisville Metro Office of Resilience and Community Services. Visit bankonlouisville.org for current certified account list.
notes_es: Dirigido por la Oficina de Resiliencia y Servicios Comunitarios de Louisville. Visite bankonlouisville.org para lista de cuentas certificadas. Centro de Empoderamiento Financiero: asesoría gratuita.
hours: Online resources 24/7; coalition office Mon–Fri business hours
services: Partner referrals|Basic needs assistance|Counseling

name: Commonwealth Credit Union — 20/20 Checking
description: Commonwealth Credit Union offers 20/20 Checking—a second-chance account for members rebuilding after negative banking history. No minimum balance; $10 monthly fee; free Visa debit card with mobile wallet access; digital banking included. After one year of responsible use, members may transition to a standard commonWEALTH Checking account. Serves Central Kentucky with 17 branch locations. Membership open to those who live, work, worship, or attend school in eligible Kentucky counties.
description_es: Commonwealth Credit Union ofrece 20/20 Checking—cuenta de segunda oportunidad para miembros que reconstruyen después de historial bancario negativo. Sin saldo mínimo; $10 mensuales; tarjeta Visa débito gratis; banca digital incluida. Después de un año de uso responsable, puede pasar a commonWEALTH Checking. Sirve al centro de Kentucky con 17 sucursales.
eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
notes: Lexington Hamburg branch: 2540 Sir Barton Way, Lexington. Also offers Round UP and Power Checking accounts.
notes_es: Sucursal Lexington Hamburg: 2540 Sir Barton Way. También ofrece Round UP y Power Checking.
hours: Contact Center Mon–Fri 8:30 a.m.–5:00 p.m., Sat 9:00 a.m.–12:30 p.m.; branch hours vary
services: Basic needs assistance|Job readiness training|Partner referrals

name: Transit Authority of River City (TARC) — Louisville
description: Transit Authority of River City (TARC) operates public bus service throughout Louisville and Jefferson County with 24+ fixed routes and 3,400+ stops—primary transit for people without vehicles. Adult fare $2.25 per ride (effective March 2026); reduced fares $1.00 for seniors, students, and eligible riders. Passes: 24-hour ($5), 7-day ($25), 30-day ($75). Pay with MyTARC card, Token Transit app, or exact cash. TARC3 paratransit available for eligible riders with disabilities. Customer service at 1000 W. Broadway.
description_es: TARC opera autobuses públicos en Louisville y el Condado de Jefferson con más de 24 rutas y 3,400 paradas—transporte principal para personas sin vehículo. Tarifa adulto $2.25 por viaje; tarifa reducida $1.00. Pases: 24 horas ($5), 7 días ($25), 30 días ($75). Pague con tarjeta MyTARC, app Token Transit o efectivo exacto. TARC3 paratransit para personas elegibles con discapacidades.
eligibility: Open to the public; reduced fares may require eligibility documentation (age, disability, or income).
eligibility_es: Abierto al público; tarifas reducidas pueden requerir documentación de elegibilidad (edad, discapacidad o ingresos).
notes: MyTARC card kiosk: 1000 W. Broadway, Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. Real-time schedules at ridetarc.org or Transit app. Network redesign launching August 2026.
notes_es: Quiosco MyTARC: 1000 W. Broadway, lun–vie 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. Horarios en tiempo real en ridetarc.org o app Transit.
hours: Route hours vary; customer service Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.
services: Transportation assistance|Bus pass assistance|Partner referrals

name: Lextran — Lexington Public Transit
description: Lextran is Lexington and Fayette County's public bus system operating 26 fixed routes 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Standard fare $1.00 per trip; half fares ($0.50) for seniors 62+ and people with disabilities with Lextran ID card. Service spans 5:00 a.m.–12:30 a.m. weekdays/Saturdays and 5:00 a.m.–9:30 p.m. Sundays. Downtown Transit Center at 150 E. Vine Street is the route hub. Lextran Wheels paratransit serves riders who cannot use fixed routes.
description_es: Lextran es el sistema de autobuses públicos de Lexington y Fayette con 26 rutas los 7 días del año. Tarifa estándar $1.00 por viaje; media tarifa ($0.50) para mayores de 62 años y personas con discapacidad con tarjeta Lextran. Servicio de 5:00 a.m. a 12:30 a.m. entre semana/sábados. Centro de Tránsito en 150 E. Vine Street. Lextran Wheels paratransit para quienes no pueden usar rutas fijas.
eligibility: Open to the public; reduced fares may require eligibility documentation (age, disability, or income).
eligibility_es: Abierto al público; tarifas reducidas pueden requerir documentación de elegibilidad (edad, discapacidad o ingresos).
notes: Transit Center: 150 E. Vine St, M–F 6 a.m.–5:45 p.m., Sat 8 a.m.–4 p.m. Admin office: 200 W. Loudon Ave, M–F 8 a.m.–5 p.m. Passes available at Kroger and admin office.
notes_es: Centro de Tránsito: 150 E. Vine St. Oficina administrativa: 200 W. Loudon Ave. Pases disponibles en Kroger y oficina administrativa.
hours: Routes approximately 5:00 a.m.–12:30 a.m. (weekdays); Transit Center M–F 6:00 a.m.–5:45 p.m., Sat 8:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.
services: Transportation assistance|Partner referrals|Bus pass assistance|Food pantry access

name: TANK — Transit Authority of Northern Kentucky
description: Transit Authority of Northern Kentucky (TANK) provides public bus service in Boone, Campbell, and Kenton counties with connections to downtown Cincinnati. Operates 27 routes, 19 park-and-ride locations, and the RAMP paratransit program for riders with disabilities, 365 days a year. Covington Transit Center on Madison Avenue is a major hub. Essential transportation for NKY residents without vehicles traveling to work, appointments, and Cincinnati-area destinations.
description_es: TANK proporciona autobuses públicos en los condados Boone, Campbell y Kenton con conexiones al centro de Cincinnati. Opera 27 rutas, 19 park-and-ride y paratransit RAMP para personas con discapacidades, 365 días al año. Centro de Tránsito de Covington en Madison Avenue es un hub principal. Transporte esencial para residentes de NKY sin vehículo.
eligibility: Open to the public; reduced fares may require eligibility documentation (age, disability, or income).
eligibility_es: Abierto al público; tarifas reducidas pueden requerir documentación de elegibilidad (edad, discapacidad o ingresos).
notes: Lost & found and customer service: 859-331-TANK (8265), Mon–Fri 7 a.m.–6 p.m. Schedules and fare info at tankbus.org.
notes_es: Objetos perdidos y servicio al cliente: 859-331-TANK, lun–vie 7 a.m.–6 p.m. Horarios en tankbus.org. Socio de Cincinnati SORTA para servicio transfronterizo.
hours: Route hours vary by line; administration Mon–Fri 7:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
services: Transportation assistance|Partner referrals

name: Kentucky Child Support Services — Attorney General
description: Kentucky's child support program is administered by the Office of the Attorney General as the Department of Child Support Services (DCSS), effective July 1, 2025 (previously under CHFS). Handles establishment of paternity and support orders, modification, enforcement, wage withholding, and payment tracking for cases statewide. Custodial and non-custodial parents can apply online, make payments, and manage cases through kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov. Hotline for case assistance; 24/7 automated payment info at 800-443-1576.
description_es: El programa de manutención de menores de Kentucky es administrado por la Fiscalía General como DCSS, desde el 1 de julio de 2025. Maneja paternidad, órdenes de manutención, modificación, ejecución, retención salarial y seguimiento de pagos. Padres custodios y no custodios pueden solicitar, pagar y gestionar casos en kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov. Línea de ayuda; información automatizada 24/7 al 800-443-1576.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes: Hotline: (800) 248-1163 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET). IVR 24/7: (800) 443-1576. Mail payments: P.O. Box 14059, Lexington, KY 40512-4059. K-TAP recipients receive services automatically.
notes_es: Línea: (800) 248-1163 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET). IVR 24/7: (800) 443-1576. Pagos por correo: P.O. Box 14059, Lexington, KY 40512-4059.
hours: Hotline Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET; online portal 24/7
services: Children's services|Civil legal representation|Partner referrals|Parenting services

name: Louisville Metro Child Support Division
description: Jefferson County Attorney's Office Child Support Division—Kentucky's largest county child support office with nearly 55,000 active cases—provides local enforcement for Jefferson County residents under contract with the state DCSS (Attorney General). Services include locating non-custodial parents, establishing and modifying orders, medical support, payment monitoring, and enforcement. Apply in person, online at kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov, or by phone. Cash payments accepted at Bishop Lane office and Hall of Justice downtown.
description_es: División de Manutención de Menores del Fiscal del Condado de Jefferson—la oficina más grande de Kentucky—proporciona ejecución local para residentes del condado bajo contrato con DCSS estatal. Servicios incluyen localización de padres no custodios, establecimiento y modificación de órdenes, apoyo médico y monitoreo de pagos. Solicite en persona, en kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov o por teléfono.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes: Payment window: Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–4:45 p.m. at 1930 Bishop Lane and Hall of Justice (600 W. Jefferson St, 1st floor). After-hours drop box at both locations. State hotline: (800) 248-1163.
notes_es: Ventanilla de pagos: lun–vie 8:00 a.m.–4:45 p.m. en 1930 Bishop Lane y Hall of Justice (600 W. Jefferson St). Buzón después de horas en ambos lugares.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. (phones 8:30 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; payment window until 4:45 p.m.)
services: Parenting services|Civil legal representation|Partner referrals|Primary medical care

name: KVC Kentucky — Family Reunification Services
description: KVC Kentucky is a nonprofit child welfare and behavioral health organization headquartered in Lexington, serving more than 22,000 children and families annually across eight Kentucky regions. Family First Preservation and Reunification Services help families stay together or reunify after out-of-home placement through in-home, evidence-based support coordinated with DCBS. Also provides behavioral health, substance abuse treatment, and foster care services. All preservation/reunification referrals come through the Department for Community Based Services (DCBS)—contact your DCBS worker to initiate. The program supports Kentuckians navigating reentry in throughout Kentucky.
description_es: KVC Kentucky es una organización sin fines de lucro de bienestar infantil y salud conductual con sede en Lexington, que sirve a más de 22,000 niños y familias anualmente en ocho regiones. Servicios de Preservación y Reunificación Familiar ayudan a familias a permanecer juntas o reunificarse después de separación, coordinados con DCBS. También ofrece salud conductual, tratamiento de sustancias y cuidado de crianza. Referidos de preservación/reunificación vienen de DCBS. El programa apoya a kentuckianos en reinserción en en todo Kentucky.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes: For current intake, call (859) 254-1035; visit https://kentucky.kvc.org/. Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment.
notes_es: Para admisión actual, llame al (859) 254-1035; visite https://kentucky.kvc.org/. Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment.
hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment
services: Family reunification support|Behavioral health services|Substance use treatment|Parenting services

name: Center for Women and Families — Louisville
description: The Center for Women and Families provides 24/7 trauma-informed advocacy, crisis response, emergency shelter, and support for survivors of intimate partner violence and sexual assault across nine Kentuckiana counties (Jefferson, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer, Trimble in KY; Clark and Floyd in IN). Highly relevant for women leaving incarceration with domestic violence history. Louisville campus at 927 S. 2nd Street open 24 hours with emergency shelter. Toll-free crisis line available statewide.
description_es: The Center for Women and Families ofrece defensa informada sobre trauma 24/7, respuesta a crisis, refugio de emergencia y apoyo a sobrevivientes de violencia de pareja y agresión sexual en nueve condados de Kentuckiana. Muy relevante para mujeres que salen del encarcelamiento con historial de violencia doméstica. Campus de Louisville en 927 S. 2nd Street abierto 24 horas con refugio de emergencia.
eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
notes: Toll-free 24/7 crisis line: 1-844-237-2331. Louisville local crisis line: (502) 581-7222. Walk-in advocacy Mon–Fri 9 a.m.–5 p.m. at 927 S. 2nd St.
notes_es: Línea de crisis 24/7 gratuita: 1-844-237-2331. Línea local Louisville: (502) 581-7222. Atención sin cita lun–vie 9 a.m.–5 p.m. Intérpretes disponibles.
hours: 24/7 crisis line and Louisville campus; walk-in advocacy Mon–Fri 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.
services: Crisis services|Emergency shelter|Civil legal representation|Domestic violence support|Civil rights advocacy|Children's services

name: Reflections of Hope
description: Reflections of Hope provides Adult Peer Support Specialist (APSS) certification training dual-certified for both Kentucky and Ohio—one training yielding credentials in both states. Also offers Community Support Associate (CSA) training for Kentucky. Programs prepare individuals with lived experience in mental health or substance use recovery for peer support careers inside and outside the justice system, supporting reentry and recidivism reduction. Kentucky APSS requires 30+ hours of state-approved training, written and oral exams, and registration through DBHDID TRIS.
description_es: Reflections of Hope ofrece capacitación de Especialista en Apoyo entre Pares para Adultos (APSS) con certificación dual para Kentucky y Ohio—una capacitación, dos credenciales. También ofrece capacitación CSA para Kentucky. Prepara personas con experiencia vivida en salud mental o recuperación de sustancias para carreras de apoyo entre pares dentro y fuera del sistema judicial, apoyando la reinserción.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: KY requirements: 18+, high school diploma/GED, documented mental health or substance use diagnosis with pattern of recovery. Upload CEUs to tris.dbhdid.ky.gov. Online 40-hour dual KY/OH certification available.
notes_es: Requisitos KY: 18+, diploma/GED, diagnóstico documentado de salud mental o sustancias con patrón de recuperación. Suba CEUs a tris.dbhdid.ky.gov. Certificación dual en línea de 40 horas disponible.
hours: Training schedules vary; online and in-person cohorts—check reflecthope.org
services: Support groups|Partner referrals|Workforce development|Reentry navigation

name: EKCEP — Peer Recovery Coaches (Eastern KY)
description: Eastern Kentucky Concentrated Employment Program (EKCEP) Recovery & Reentry division serves 23 Appalachian coalfield counties through the Strategic Initiative for Transformational Employment (SITE). Job Entry and Retention Support Specialists (JERSS) connect justice-involved individuals and people in recovery with career advising, barrier relief (IDs, transportation, certifications), peer support training funding, and second-chance employer placement. EKCEP is a WIOA-funded American Job Center partner headquartered in Hazard.
description_es: EKCEP Recovery & Reentry sirve 23 condados apalaches a través del SITE. Especialistas JERSS conectan a personas en recuperación e involucradas con la justicia con orientación profesional, alivio de barreras (identificaciones, transporte, certificaciones), financiamiento de capacitación en apoyo entre pares y colocación con empleadores de segunda oportunidad. Socio de American Job Center con sede en Hazard.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: Connect with a JERSS at ekcep.org/recovery. Also operates Kentucky Career Center in Pikeville (id 502). Counties include Perry, Pike, Floyd, Letcher, Knott, and 18 others.
notes_es: Conecte con un JERSS en ekcep.org/recovery. Condados incluyen Perry, Pike, Floyd, Letcher, Knott y 18 más.
hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; contact for appointment
services: Employment assistance|Expungement assistance|Support groups

name: Baptist Fellowship Center — Reentry Mentor Program
description: Baptist Fellowship Center is a faith-based community ministry in west Louisville offering youth mentoring (S.O.Y. Save Our Youth program), family support, employment readiness, and life-skills training for individuals and families seeking stability after incarceration or justice involvement. Provides mentoring, budgeting help, and connections to community partners—not a state-contracted reentry facility, but a grassroots support hub open to returning citizens.
description_es: Baptist Fellowship Center es un ministerio comunitario de base religiosa en el oeste de Louisville que ofrece mentoría juvenil (programa S.O.Y.), apoyo familiar, preparación laboral y capacitación en habilidades de vida para personas que buscan estabilidad después del encarcelamiento. Proporciona mentoría, ayuda con presupuesto y conexiones comunitarias.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: S.O.Y. male mentoring for ages 10–17. Family support includes counseling, parenting skills, and financial management. Call or use online contact form to inquire about adult reentry support.
notes_es: Mentoría S.O.Y. para jóvenes de 10–17 años. Apoyo familiar incluye consejería y habilidades financieras. Llame para consultar apoyo de reinserción para adultos.
hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; call for appointment
services: Children's services|Counseling|Employment assistance|Partner referrals|Workforce development

name: NA / Narcotics Anonymous — Kentucky
description: Narcotics Anonymous Kentucky offers free peer-led recovery meetings for people seeking freedom from addiction. Meetings available in all Kentucky regions—in-person, online, and hybrid—with no dues, fees, or membership requirements. Use the meeting finder to locate the nearest group by city or zip code. Welcoming to people leaving incarceration, treatment, or active use.
description_es: Narcotics Anonymous Kentucky ofrece reuniones gratuitas de recuperación lideradas por pares para personas que buscan libertad de la adicción. Reuniones en todas las regiones de Kentucky—en persona, en línea e híbridas—sin cuotas ni requisitos de membresía. Use el buscador de reuniones por ciudad o código postal.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: Meeting finder: naky.org/find-a-meeting
notes_es: NA no está afiliado a ninguna otra organización. Formatos de reuniones varían. Reuniones virtuales en naky.org. No se requiere referido.
hours: Meeting times vary by group; many groups meet daily—check meeting finder
services: Partner referrals|Substance use treatment|Rent and utility assistance

name: AA / Alcoholics Anonymous — Kentucky
description: Alcoholics Anonymous Kentucky provides free peer support meetings for people recovering from alcohol use disorder. Meetings held statewide in cities and rural communities, with many online options. No dues, fees, or professional counselors—members share experience, strength, and hope. Open to anyone with a desire to stop drinking, including people reentering from incarceration.
description_es: Alcoholics Anonymous Kentucky proporciona reuniones gratuitas de apoyo entre pares para personas en recuperación del trastorno por uso de alcohol. Reuniones en todo el estado con muchas opciones en línea. Sin cuotas ni consejeros profesionales. Abierto a cualquier persona que desee dejar de beber.
eligibility: Open to adults in recovery or seeking peer support, including those recently released from incarceration.
eligibility_es: Abierto a adultos en recuperación o que buscan apoyo entre pares, incluidos recién liberados.
notes: Find local meetings at aa-ky.org or call your area's AA hotline. Open meetings welcome anyone
notes_es: Encuentre reuniones locales en aa-ky.org. Reuniones abiertas dan la bienvenida a todos cerradas para quienes tienen un problema de alcohol.
hours: Meeting schedules vary; many groups meet daily—check aa-ky.org
services: Partner referrals|Substance use treatment

name: KCTCS — Adult Education & GED (Statewide)
description: Kentucky Community and Technical College System (KCTCS) administers free adult education and GED preparation statewide through 13 college-based Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) providers in all 120 counties. Classes offered in communities, jails, and prisons. Kentucky pays for first GED test in each subject (plus limited retakes) for eligible test-takers who pass the free GED Ready practice test—use promo code KYFREEGED1. Over 4,460 GEDs awarded to incarcerated Kentuckians 2020–2024.
description_es: KCTCS administra educación para adultos y preparación GED gratuita en 120 condados a través de 13 proveedores KYAE. Clases en comunidades, cárceles y prisiones. Kentucky paga la primera prueba GED en cada materia para elegibles que pasen GED Ready—código KYFREEGED1. Más de 4,460 GEDs otorgados a personas encarceladas 2020–2024.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: Contact your local KCTCS college to find the nearest program
notes_es: Encuentre su centro en kyae.ky.gov. Edad mínima 19 sin exención. También ofrece ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar.
hours: Local center hours vary by KCTCS college—contact nearest provider
services: GED and high school equivalency|Probation and parole supervision|Workforce development

name: Bluegrass Community & Technical College — Adult Education
description: Bluegrass Community & Technical College (BCTC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation for adults in Central Kentucky—Fayette, Bourbon, Clark, Harrison, Jessamine, Mercer, Scott, and Woodford counties. In-person and online class options. Part of the statewide KYAE/KCTCS network with free GED Ready testing and state-funded first-time GED exam fees for eligible students. The program supports Kentuckians navigating reentry in 17 Kentucky counties.
description_es: Educación para Adultos de BCTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita en el centro de Kentucky—8 condados incluido Fayette. Opciones en persona y en línea. Parte de la red KYAE/KCTCS con GED Ready gratuito y exámenes GED financiados por el estado para elegibles. El programa apoya a kentuckianos en reinserción en 17 condados de Kentucky.
eligibility: Part of the statewide KYAE/KCTCS network with free GED Ready testing and state-funded first-time GED exam fees for eligible students.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: Contact BCTCAdultEd@kctcs.edu.
notes_es: Inscripción requiere evaluación de habilidades. Contacte BCTCAdultEd@kctcs.edu. Edad mínima 19 o exención para 18 años.
hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; class schedules vary by location
services: GED and high school equivalency|Partner referrals|Workforce development

name: Gateway Community & Technical College — Adult Education
description: Gateway Community & Technical College Adult Education offers free GED preparation in Northern Kentucky for Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen, and surrounding counties. Kentucky waives GED testing fees for first-time test takers working through a KYAE center. Classes at Florence campus and community sites. Gateway also recognizes GED College Ready scores for college enrollment.
description_es: Educación para Adultos de Gateway ofrece preparación GED gratuita en el norte de Kentucky para Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen y condados circundantes. Kentucky exonera tarifas GED para primeros solicitantes a través de un centro KYAE. Clases en Florence y sitios comunitarios.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: GED fee waiver available when working with local Gateway/KYAE office.
notes_es: Contacte al (859) 442-1695 para inscripción. Exención de tarifa GED disponible trabajando con la oficina Gateway/KYAE.
services: GED and high school equivalency|Primary medical care|Workforce development

name: South Central KY CTC (SKYCTC) — Adult Education
description: South Central KY CTC (SKYCTC) — Adult Education serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in 10 Kentucky counties. Southcentral Kentucky Community & Technical College (SKYCTC) Adult Education provides free GED classes for Warren, Barren, Simpson, and Metcalfe counties. Part of the KCTCS/KYAE statewide network with corrections education offerings. Kentucky covers first GED test fees for eligible students completing GED Ready through a local center. Coalition and navigator programs connect returning citizens to local partners—they rarely provide emergency shelter, cash aid, or 24/7 crisis response on their own. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
description_es: South Central KY CTC (SKYCTC) — Adult Education sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en 10 condados de Kentucky. Las coaliciones y programas de navegación conectan a ciudadanos que regresan con aliados locales—rara vez ofrecen refugio de emergencia, efectivo o respuesta de crisis 24/7 por sí solos. Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: For current intake, call (270) 901-1017; visit https://southcentral.kctcs.edu/workforce-solutions/adult-education/index.aspx. Monday–Friday during business hours.
notes_es: Para admisión actual, llame al (270) 901-1017; visite https://southcentral.kctcs.edu/workforce-solutions/adult-education/index.aspx. Monday–Friday during business hours.
services: GED and high school equivalency|Job readiness training|Workforce development|Probation and parole supervision

name: Kentucky Adult Education — Find a Program
description: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) is the state office connecting residents to free adult education in all 120 counties—GED preparation, literacy, ESL, workforce certifications, and family literacy. Use the online locator to find your county's KCTCS-based adult education center. All GED seekers must pass the GED Ready practice test (free at KYAE centers) before qualifying for state-funded GED testing.
description_es: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) conecta a residentes con educación para adultos gratuita en 120 condados—GED, alfabetización, ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar. Use el localizador en línea para encontrar su centro. Todos deben pasar GED Ready (gratis en centros KYAE) antes de calificar para pruebas financiadas.
eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
notes: Promo codes: KYFREEGED1 (test center) or OPKYFREEGED (online proctored).
notes_es: Códigos promocionales: KYFREEGED1 (centro) u OPKYFREEGED (en línea). Inscripción no requerida pero recomendada para apoyo académico.
hours: Varies by county center—use locator for local contact
services: Partner referrals|GED and high school equivalency|Workforce development

name: Robley Rex VA Medical Center — Louisville
description: Robley Rex VA Medical Center is a full-service VA hospital serving Louisville-area veterans 24/7. Offers primary care, mental health, substance use treatment, specialty care, and homeless veteran services. Justice-involved veterans can access Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) coordinators embedded in mental health who work with courts, jails, and probation. Toll-free: 800-376-8387.
description_es: Robley Rex VA Medical Center es un hospital del VA de servicio completo para veteranos del área de Louisville las 24 horas. Ofrece atención primaria, salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias y servicios para veteranos sin hogar. Veteranos en el sistema de justicia acceden a coordinadores VJO en salud mental. Toll-free: 800-376-8387.
eligibility: Justice-involved veterans can access Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) coordinators embedded in mental health who work with courts, jails, and probation.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Enroll in VA health care at va.gov/health-care/apply. Emergency: 911 or visit ER 24/7.
notes_es: Inscríbase en atención VA en va.gov/health-care/apply. VJO: pida Salud Mental/VJO al llamar. Emergencia: 911 o ER 24/7.
services: Primary medical care|Benefits navigation|Veterans services|Basic needs assistance

name: Louisville VA — Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO)
description: Louisville VA Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) places four coordinators at Robley Rex VA who work directly with courts, jails, and probation/parole to identify and engage justice-involved veterans. VJO helps veterans access VA mental health, substance use treatment, housing, and benefits as an alternative to incarceration when appropriate. Ask for Mental Health/VJO when calling the medical center.
description_es: VJO del VA de Louisville coloca cuatro coordinadores en Robley Rex que trabajan con tribunales, cárceles y libertad condicional para identificar veteranos en el sistema de justicia. VJO ayuda a acceder a salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias, vivienda y beneficios del VA. Pida Salud Mental/VJO al llamar.
eligibility: Louisville VA Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) places four coordinators at Robley Rex VA who work directly with courts, jails, and probation/parole to identify and engage justice-involved veterans.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: VJO emails: sonny.hatfield@va.gov | scott.huisman@va.gov | dawne.james@va.gov | Keather.Likins@va.gov
notes_es: Especialistas VJO: Sonny Hatfield, Scott Huisman, Dawne James, Keather Likins. Línea de crisis: 988 presione 1.
hours: Coordinators available during business hours; crisis line 24/7
services: Veterans services|Benefits navigation|Probation and parole supervision|Partner referrals|Reentry navigation

name: Lexington VA Medical Center
description: Lexington VA Health Care System serves Central and Eastern Kentucky veterans across Leestown and Sousley campuses. Full-service medical center with mental health, substance use treatment, primary care, and specialty services. Justice-involved veterans can connect with VJO coordinators and homeless veteran care teams for reentry support from jails and courts in the region.
description_es: Lexington VA Health Care System sirve a veteranos del centro y este de Kentucky en los campus Leestown y Sousley. Centro médico completo con salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias y atención primaria. Veteranos en el sistema de justicia pueden conectarse con coordinadores VJO y equipos de veteranos sin hogar.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Main campus: 1101 Veterans Drive (Leestown). Enroll at va.gov/health-care/apply. Sousley campus offers additional outpatient services.
notes_es: Campus principal: 1101 Veterans Drive (Leestown). Inscríbase en va.gov/health-care/apply.
hours: Varies by clinic; emergency services available—call for hours
services: Primary medical care|Benefits navigation|Veterans services

name: Lexington VA — Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO)
description: Lexington VA Veterans Justice Outreach connects justice-involved veterans in Central and Eastern Kentucky to VA mental health, substance use, housing, and benefits through court and jail partnerships. VJO coordinators Kathy Vasquez and Janis Skilling serve Fayette County and surrounding regions including satellite Vet Center locations in Corbin, Lawrenceburg, London, Mt. Sterling, and Richmond.
description_es: VJO del VA de Lexington conecta a veteranos en el sistema de justicia en el centro y este de Kentucky con salud mental, sustancias, vivienda y beneficios del VA. Coordinadoras Kathy Vasquez y Janis Skilling sirven Fayette y regiones circundantes incluyendo Centros Vet satélite.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: VJO emails: kathy.vasquez2@va.gov | janis.skilling@va.gov
notes_es: Correos VJO: kathy.vasquez2@va.gov, janis.skilling@va.gov. Línea nacional veteranos sin hogar: 877-424-3838.
hours: Business hours; after-hours crisis via Veterans Crisis Line 988 press 1
services: Veterans services|Benefits navigation|Probation and parole supervision|Partner referrals

name: National Call Center for Homeless Veterans
description: National Call Center for Homeless Veterans (877-4AID-VET) is a free, confidential 24/7 hotline connecting veterans— including those leaving incarceration without housing—to the nearest VA homeless program, emergency shelter, and case management. Critical first contact for veterans with no place to stay after release. Trained counselors assess needs and link to HUD-VASH, SSVF, and other VA housing resources. The program supports Kentuckians navigating reentry in throughout Kentucky.
description_es: Línea nacional para veteranos sin hogar (877-4AID-VET) es una línea gratuita y confidencial 24/7 que conecta a veteranos—incluidos los que salen del encarcelamiento sin vivienda—con el programa de vivienda del VA más cercano, refugio de emergencia y gestión de casos. El programa apoya a kentuckianos en reinserción en en todo Kentucky.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Also chat at va.gov/homeless/nationalcallcenter.asp. Have DD-214 and SSN ready if available. Works with local VA Medical Center homeless teams.
notes_es: También chat en va.gov/homeless. Tenga DD-214 y SSN listos si están disponibles.
hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
services: Crisis services|Partner referrals|Reentry navigation|Benefits navigation

name: Veterans Crisis Line
description: Veterans Crisis Line provides free, confidential crisis support for veterans and their families 24/7. Call or text 988 then press 1, or chat at veteranscrisisline.net. Trained responders—many veterans themselves—provide immediate support for suicidal crisis, PTSD episodes, and reentry stress. Also supports active duty, Guard, Reserve, and family members.
description_es: Línea de Crisis para Veteranos ofrece apoyo gratuito y confidencial 24/7. Llame o envíe mensaje al 988 y presione 1, o chat en veteranscrisisline.net. Respondedores capacitados brindan apoyo inmediato en crisis suicida, TEPT y estrés de reinserción.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Text 838255 to connect. If immediate danger, call 911. Spanish-language support available.
notes_es: Envíe mensaje al 838255. No requiere inscripción en VA. Si hay peligro inmediato, llame al 911. Soporte en español disponible.
hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
services: Crisis services|Partner referrals|Family reunification support

name: Louisville Vet Center
description: Louisville Vet Center provides free, confidential counseling in a non-VA community setting for combat veterans and their families—often easier to access than a medical center. Services include PTSD treatment, military sexual trauma (MST) support, readjustment counseling, bereavement, and reentry navigation. No cost regardless of discharge status for combat veterans. Same 877 number provides 24/7 crisis support.
description_es: Louisville Vet Center ofrece consejería gratuita y confidencial en un entorno comunitario no-VA para veteranos de combate y familias. Servicios incluyen tratamiento de TEPT, apoyo MST, consejería de reajuste y navegación de reinserción. Sin costo para veteranos de combate. Mismo número 877 brinda apoyo de crisis 24/7.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–4:30pm. 24/7 crisis support at same number.
notes_es: Llame al 877-927-8387 para admisión. No requiere seguro ni inscripción VA.
services: Counseling|Reentry navigation|Crisis services

name: Lexington Vet Center
description: Lexington Vet Center offers free counseling and reentry support for combat veterans in a welcoming, non-clinical community setting. Satellite outreach locations in Corbin, Lawrenceburg, London, Mt. Sterling, and Richmond extend access across Central and Eastern Kentucky. Services include PTSD treatment, MST support, marriage and family counseling, and employment transition help.
description_es: Lexington Vet Center ofrece consejería gratuita y apoyo de reinserción para veteranos de combate en un entorno comunitario acogedor. Ubicaciones satélite en Corbin, Lawrenceburg, London, Mt. Sterling y Richmond. Servicios incluyen TEPT, MST, consejería familiar y transición laboral.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Call 877-927-8387 for appointments at any location. 24/7 crisis support on same number.
notes_es: Llame al 877-927-8387 para citas en cualquier ubicación. Servicio de combate requerido para la mayoría de servicios.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; satellite hours vary—call to confirm
services: Counseling|Probation and parole supervision|Employment assistance|Crisis services

name: Louisville VA Regional Benefit Office
description: Louisville VA Regional Benefit Office processes disability compensation claims, pension, education benefits (GI Bill), vocational rehabilitation (VR&E Chapter 31), and life insurance for Kentucky veterans. Chapter 31 VR&E helps veterans with service-connected disabilities prepare for, find, and keep employment—including justice-involved veterans rebuilding careers after incarceration.
description_es: Oficina Regional de Beneficios del VA de Louisville procesa reclamaciones de compensación por discapacidad, pensión, beneficios educativos (GI Bill), rehabilitación vocacional (VR&E Capítulo 31) y seguro de vida. Capítulo 31 VR&E ayuda a veteranos con discapacidades relacionadas con el servicio a prepararse y mantener empleo.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
notes: Chapter 31 Voc Rehab: (502) 566-4453
notes_es: Capítulo 31 VR&E: (502) 566-4453. Presente reclamaciones en línea en va.gov.
services: Benefits navigation

name: HUD-VASH — Housing Vouchers for Homeless Veterans
description: HUD-VASH pairs HUD Section 8 rental vouchers with VA case management for homeless veterans, including those transitioning from incarceration. Entry point is through the VA Medical Center homeless team—call Robley Rex at (502) 287-4000 or the National Call Center at 877-424-3838. Louisville Metro Housing Authority administers local vouchers. VOA Mid-States provides SSVF (Supportive Services for Veteran Families) across Kentucky.
description_es: HUD-VASH combina vales de alquiler HUD Sección 8 con gestión de casos del VA para veteranos sin hogar, incluidos los que salen del encarcelamiento. Punto de entrada: equipo de veteranos sin hogar del VA—Robley Rex (502) 287-4000 o 877-424-3838. Louisville Metro Housing Authority administra vales locales. VOA Mid-States ofrece SSVF.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.

notes_es: LMHA: (502) 569-6060. VOA SSVF: (502) 384-0868. Debe estar inscrito en atención VA. Listas de espera aplican.
hours: VA intake during business hours; homeless hotline 24/7
services: Partner referrals|Benefits navigation|Housing navigation|Veterans services|Supportive housing

name: Kentucky Department of Veterans Affairs (KDVA)
description: Kentucky Department of Veterans Affairs (KDVA) is the state agency supporting Kentucky's 290,000+ veterans with 20 federally accredited Veteran Service Officers (VSOs) in regional offices. Programs include Veterans High School Diploma, Homeless Veterans Program, Women Veterans Program, and free benefits claims assistance. VSOs help file VA disability, pension, and education claims at no charge.
description_es: KDVA es la agencia estatal que apoya a más de 290,000 veteranos de Kentucky con 20 Oficiales de Servicios para Veteranos (VSO) acreditados federalmente. Programas incluyen Diploma de Escuela Secundaria para Veteranos, Programa para Veteranos sin Hogar, Mujeres Veteranas y asistencia gratuita con reclamaciones de beneficios.
eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.

hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. (regional offices; hours may vary)
services: Benefits navigation|Veterans services|Partner referrals

name: VFW Department of Kentucky
description: VFW Department of Kentucky provides free VA-accredited service officers who help veterans file disability compensation, pension, vocational rehabilitation, and employment benefit claims. Post-level VSOs located throughout the state—no membership required for claims assistance. Department headquarters in Louisville coordinates training and advocacy for Kentucky veterans.

VSO a nivel de post en todo el estado—no se requiere membresía para asistencia.

name: Kentucky American Legion
description: Kentucky American Legion serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in throughout Kentucky. Kentucky American Legion operates a statewide network of free Veteran Service Officers helping veterans navigate VA disability claims, pension applications, and benefits appeals. Local posts in communities across all 120 counties provide claims assistance without requiring Legion membership. Department headquarters in Louisville. Coalition and navigator programs connect returning citizens to local partners—they rarely provide emergency shelter, cash aid, or 24/7 crisis response on their own. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.

Las coaliciones y programas de navegación conectan a ciudadanos que regresan con aliados locales—rara vez ofrecen refugio de emergencia, efectivo o respuesta de crisis 24/7 por sí solos. Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.

name: Wayside Christian Mission — Louisville
description: Wayside Christian Mission provides emergency shelter, meals, clothing, and hygiene supplies for men and women in downtown Louisville. Operates the Sober Living Recovery Program and Work Therapy Program for residents building stability after homelessness or incarceration. Accepts donated clothing and distributes to clients. 24/7 shelter access for those in crisis.

Opera el Programa de Vida Sobria y Terapia Laboral para residentes que construyen estabilidad después de la falta de vivienda o encarcelamiento. Acepta donaciones de ropa.

Serves low-income Louisvillians including people reentering from incarceration who need food, clothing, and short-term shelter.

Has served 16,500+ women with suiting, interview preparation, and ongoing career support. The program supports Kentuckians navigating reentry in Jefferson County.

name: Center for Employment Opportunities (CEO) — Louisville
description: Center for Employment Opportunities (CEO) Louisville exclusively serves people recently released from incarceration who are on probation or parole. One-week job-readiness orientation leads to paid transitional work crews (daily pay), then job coaching, employer outreach, and up to one year of retention support after full-time placement. Referral through parole/probation officer required. Opened August 2019 in partnership with KY DOC and KYTC.
description_es: CEO Louisville sirve exclusivamente a personas recién liberadas en libertad condicional o vigilada. Orientación de una semana conduce a trabajos de transición pagados (pago diario), luego coaching laboral y hasta un año de apoyo después de la colocación. Se requiere referido del oficial de libertad condicional/vigilada.
eligibility: Center for Employment Opportunities (CEO) Louisville exclusively serves people recently released from incarceration who are on probation or parole. Referral through parole/probation officer required.

Accepts residents with felony records; Christ-centered but open to all seeking recovery.

Acepta residentes con antecedentes penales.

description: Boyle County Detention Center (BCDC) hosts a Kentucky DOC-contracted Substance Abuse Program (SAP) for state-sentenced male inmates—a six-month intensive therapeutic community with 35 hours weekly of evidence-based curriculum, group therapy, and recovery activities. eligibility: Adults seeking substance use treatment. Medicaid and private insurance accepted at many locations; call for intake and admission criteria.

name: Probation & Parole — Maysville (Mason County)
description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 14 field office in Maysville supervises individuals on felony probation, parole, or conditional discharge in Mason, Bracken, Fleming, Lewis, and Robertson counties. Officers connect supervisees to DCBS benefits offices, regional workforce centers, and northeast Kentucky reentry partners. Contact for reporting requirements—not emergency cash or housing.

eligibility: Individuals under Kentucky probation or parole supervision in District 14 counties.
